raw_output:
I don’t have the workers’ actual extracted values/PMIDs in what you provided (their result sections are empty), so I can’t compute the requested totals/averages/rate without fabricating data. Please paste the workers’ outputs (for PTEN/PIK3CA/AKT1 UniProt fields and the 5 PubMed PMIDs with yes/no flags), or allow me to re-run the retrieval myself.

Once I have those numbers, I will report exactly in this format:

- **VARIANTS:** (PTEN variants + PIK3CA variants + AKT1 variants)  
- **AVG_LENGTH:** (PTEN length + PIK3CA length + AKT1 length) / 3  
- **CROSS_MENTION_RATE:** (# of first 5 PubMed results mentioning PTEN + PIK3CA + AKT1 in title/abstract) / 5  
- **PATHWAY_PROTEINS:** PTEN/PIK3CA/AKT1

subtasks.description: Retrieve UniProt record for PTEN (P60484). Extract: (a) natural variant count (number of natural variants in the UniProt entry), (b) protein length (aa), (c) subcellular location text. Return these three values with citation/field source from UniProt.

Retrieve UniProt records for PIK3CA (P42336) and AKT1 (P31749). For each, extract: (a) natural variant count, (b) protein length (aa), (c) subcellular location text. Return values for both proteins with citation/field source from UniProt.

PubMed search: query 'PTEN PIK3CA AKT1 pathway cancer resistance'. Collect the first 5 results (PMIDs). For each, check title and abstract text to determine whether ALL THREE proteins (PTEN, PIK3CA, AKT1) are mentioned (case-insensitive; accept common spacing like PI3KCA vs PIK3CA only if clearly equivalent). Compute cross-mention count and CROSS_MENTION_RATE = count/5. Return PMIDs and per-result yes/no plus the computed rate.

worker_results.subtask_description: Retrieve UniProt record for PTEN (P60484). Extract: (a) natural variant count (number of natural variants in the UniProt entry), (b) protein length (aa), (c) subcellular location text. Return these three values with citation/field source from UniProt.

Retrieve UniProt records for PIK3CA (P42336) and AKT1 (P31749). For each, extract: (a) natural variant count, (b) protein length (aa), (c) subcellular location text. Return values for both proteins with citation/field source from UniProt.

PubMed search: query 'PTEN PIK3CA AKT1 pathway cancer resistance'. Collect the first 5 results (PMIDs). For each, check title and abstract text to determine whether ALL THREE proteins (PTEN, PIK3CA, AKT1) are mentioned (case-insensitive; accept common spacing like PI3KCA vs PIK3CA only if clearly equivalent). Compute cross-mention count and CROSS_MENTION_RATE = count/5. Return PMIDs and per-result yes/no plus the computed rate.
